brief.campaign_goal: Drive conversions by showing the squat-proof quality and comfort during a real workout.
brief.raw_user_brief: I need a high-energy hook showing Sienna at the gym. She needs to show off the green leggings, do a quick squat to show they are squat proof, and give a tough-love motivational quote.

visual_identity.appearance: Athletic, lean build. Sun-kissed skin. Messy blonde hair, usually styled in a high ponytail, messy bun, or clipped back with a claw clip. Bright blue eyes, minimal 'clean girl' makeup.
wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).
Oversized vintage graphic t-shirts (pump covers) worn over biker shorts.
White chunky running shoes with high white socks.
settings: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
Sunny outdoor running track or beach promenade.
Minimalist aesthetic apartment living room with a yoga mat.

voice_identity.tone: High energy, encouraging, highly authentic. Often sounds slightly breathless, as if she just finished a set or is on a walk.
voice_identity.pacing: Fast and punchy, optimized for high-retention TikTok/Reels algorithms.

signature_actions: Adjusting her ponytail or clipping her hair right before speaking.
Taking a sip from a massive pastel Stanley cup.
Wiping a small amount of sweat from her forehead casually.
Holding the camera in one hand (selfie-style) while walking.
behavior_rules.vibe: She is your hype girl and tough-love fitness bestie. IMPORTANT FOR VIDEO: Ensure all scenes use her voice as a *voiceover* (B-roll style) while she performs actions in the video, rather than her talking directly to the camera with lip sync. This creates a highly professional, cinematic, and natural UGC feel.

camera_style.angle: Selfie-style, held slightly above eye level. Intimate and close.
camera_style.movement: Slight handheld shake, dynamic pacing, frequent jump cuts to remove dead air.

strategy.angle: Tough-love aesthetic fitness angle pairing high-energy motivation with a real-time squat-proof durability check to drive high-intent conversions.
strategy.cta: Step up your standards. Tap 'Shop Now' to get your hands on the Seamless Sage Green Leggings before they sell out.
strategy.hook: Stop making excuses. If your leggings can't survive a deep squat, why are you wearing them? These sage greens don't sheer, and they don't quit.

script.script_text: Quick reality check: ... STOP making excuses! ... If your leggings can't survive a DEEP squat, ... why are you even wearing them? ... Let's get after it today, ... because these sage greens don't sheer ... and they don't QUIT! ... Alright team, ... step up your standards. ... Tap 'Shop Now' ... to get your hands on the Seamless Sage Green Leggings ... before they SELL OUT.

text_critic_report.feedback: The script strictly avoids all prohibited phrases ('Hello everyone', 'Welcome back to my channel', 'Buy this product now', 'Link in bio') and perfectly captures the high energy, tough-love fitness bestie tone of the persona, using all the required catchphrases ('Quick reality check:', "Let's get after it today,", 'Alright team,').

scenes.action: A confident female fitness trainer stands in a well-lit gym, wearing seamless sage green leggings and a matching sports bra, talking directly to the camera with high energy and expressive hand gestures. She does a quick, deep squat to demonstrate the flexibility of the leggings, maintaining a steady, upbeat attitude throughout the entire script to ensure continuous and perfect lip-sync.
scenes.camera: Static, eye-level medium shot of the fitness trainer, framing her from the waist up to clearly show both her facial expressions for lip-syncing and the seamless sage green leggings she is wearing.

wardrobe_location.location: Sunny outdoor running track or beach promenade.
wardrobe_location.wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).

static_frame_prompt.prompt: A highly detailed, continuous medium shot of a confident and energetic female fitness trainer named Sienna looking directly at the camera, actively speaking with expressive mouth movements as if delivering a script. Sienna is posing on a beautiful, sunny outdoor running track with a soft-focus bokeh background. She has a friendly, radiant expression and gestures naturally with her hands as she speaks energetic, upbeat dialogue. She is wearing a matching, seamless activewear set in pastel sage green with a stylish Lululemon aesthetic, featuring sage green leggings and a matching sports bra. The camera remains static at eye-level, framing Sienna from the waist up to keep her facial expressions and natural upper-body gestures in clear focus for perfect continuous lip-sync alignment throughout her speech.

static_frame.prompt: A highly detailed, continuous medium shot of a confident and energetic female fitness trainer named Sienna looking directly at the camera, actively speaking with expressive mouth movements as if delivering a script. Sienna is posing on a beautiful, sunny outdoor running track with a soft-focus bokeh background. She has a friendly, radiant expression and gestures naturally with her hands as she speaks energetic, upbeat dialogue. She is wearing a matching, seamless activewear set in pastel sage green with a stylish Lululemon aesthetic, featuring sage green leggings and a matching sports bra. The camera remains static at eye-level, framing Sienna from the waist up to keep her facial expressions and natural upper-body gestures in clear focus for perfect continuous lip-sync alignment throughout her speech.

image_critic_report.feedback: Image geometry matches reference anchor perfectly.

video_critic_report.feedback: The video suffers from a severe lack of audio-visual synchronization. The lip movements completely fail to match the spoken words, making the discrepancy jarringly obvious. Furthermore, the facial animations and expressions appear stiff and unnatural, creating a strong uncanny valley effect. Due to these significant issues with lip-sync and realism, the video is not production-grade.
